page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.4xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz, utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The instance is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 7 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core CPU performance, measured by stress-ng and Geekbench, falls into the bottom 25%, with single-threaded gzip compression rated in the bottom 10%. However, multi-core performance scales to average levels, as demonstrated by stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU scores. Memory bandwidth for large uncached blocks is average, reaching 69.78 GB/sec for reads and 51.98 GB/sec for writes, though the overall Passmark memory score remains in the weak tier.

This hardware profile is suited for workloads that benefit from multi-threaded execution rather than high single-threaded clock speeds. Appropriate applications include static web serving, database operations, and Redis deployments, which all demonstrate average benchmark throughput. It can also handle light LLM inference tasks for small models, though performance degrades on larger models. The lack of local storage requires external block storage, which should be factored into the overall resource architecture.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 16 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8163 processor with x86_64 architecture, 64.0 GB of RAM, and a baseline network bandwidth of 7 Gbps. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmark data shows weak single-core CPU and memory performance, but multi-core execution, database operations, and static web serving achieve average tier results. This instance is best suited for multi-threaded workloads, static web serving, and database operations that do not require high single-threaded performance or local NVMe storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and 7 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering average multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.4xlarge features 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 64 GB RAM, offering balanced multi-core performance for general-purpose workloads.
tagline: A dedicated multi-core virtual server with balanced memory allocation, optimized for parallel processing and standard web serving workloads.
bullet_points: 16 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz
64.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
7 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM hypervisor virtualization
Average multi-core CPU, database, and static web serving performance
Weak single-core performance and no bundled local storage
Suited for multi-threaded applications, Redis, and database operations
